history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young woman with long, dark hair is sitting on a patterned rug, taking a mirror selfie. She's wearing a black t-shirt and light-wash, cuffed jeans. Her left arm, visible in the foreground, has several tattoos, including what appears to be script and a cross. She's holding up a smartphone with a black case adorned with black and white graphics, obscuring part of her face. Her right arm is bent, resting on her knee. The background is a bit cluttered, with posters on the wall behind her, including one with an eye motif and others with band-like imagery. To the right, a glass door leads to an outdoor area with greenery and a blue crate. The lighting is bright, possibly from the natural light coming through the door, creating some glare and reflections on the mirror. The overall color palette is muted, with the red of her Vans sneakers and the rug providing pops of color against the neutral tones of her clothing and the room. The mood is casual and candid, a typical mirror selfie moment.
